text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : The term “final solution” was the Nazi regime’s phrase for the systematic extermination of Jews during the Holocaust, so using it today carries direct associations with genocide. Stephen Miller almost says that Trump is seeking a "final solution" in Iran but then catches himself https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2044585207005692080/video/1 - Aaron Rupar tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @TheWarMonitor : “最终解决方案”一词是纳粹政权在大屠杀期间系统性灭绝犹太人的用语，因此今天使用它带有与种族灭绝的直接关联。斯蒂芬·米勒差点说特朗普正在伊朗寻求“最终解决方案”，但随后改口了 https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2044585207005692080/video/1 - Aaron Rupar 推文

text: OSINTdefender Nimitz-class nuclear-powered aircraft carrier USS Dwight D. Eisenhower (CVN-69) suffered a fire earlier this week that injured 3 sailors. The Eisenhower is nearing the end of its planned incremental availability at Norfolk Naval Shipyard in Portsmouth, VA, that began January 8th, 2025. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 尼米兹级核动力航空母舰“德怀特·D·艾森豪威尔”号 (CVN-69) 本周早些时候发生火灾，造成3名水手受伤。艾森豪威尔号即将结束其于2025年1月8日开始的在弗吉尼亚州朴茨茅斯诺福克海军造船厂的计划内增量维护。 推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 BREAKING: Trump announces a 10-day ceasefire between Lebanon and Israel beginning at 5 PM EST, following conversations with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Trump states the two leaders met for the first time in 34 years in Washington, D.C., with Secretary of State Marco Rubio present. He has directed VP JD Vance, Rubio, and Joint Chiefs Chairman Dan Razin' Caine to work toward a "Lasting PEACE." "It has been my Honor to solve 9 Wars across the World, and this will be my 10th, so let's, GET IT DONE!" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 快讯：特朗普宣布黎巴嫩与以色列之间停火10天，从美东时间下午5点开始，此前他与黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩和以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡进行了交谈。特朗普表示，两位领导人34年来首次在华盛顿特区会面，国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥在场。他已指示副总统JD·万斯、鲁比奥和参谋长联席会议主席丹·拉津·凯恩致力于实现“持久和平”。“能解决世界各地的9场战争是我的荣幸，这将是第10场，所以让我们完成它！” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: BREAKING: Trump: I just had excellent conversations with the Highly Respected President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel. These two Leaders have agreed that in order to achieve PEACE between their Countries, they will formally begin a 10 Day CEASEFIRE at 5 P.M. EST. I have directed Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Rubio, together with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Dan Razin' Caine, to work with Israel and Lebanon to achieve a Lasting PEACE. It has been my Honor to solve 9 Wars across the World, and this will be my 10th, so let's, GET IT DONE!
text_zh: 快讯：特朗普：我刚刚与备受尊敬的黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡进行了极好的交谈。这两位领导人一致认为，为了实现两国之间的和平，他们将正式开始为期10天的停火，时间为美东时间下午5点。我已指示副总统JD·万斯和国务卿鲁比奥，与参谋长联席会议主席丹·拉津·凯恩一起，与以色列和黎巴嫩合作，实现持久和平。能解决世界各地的9场战争是我的荣幸，这将是第10场，所以让我们完成它！

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 U.S. President Trump announces a 10-day ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon: I just had excellent conversations with the Highly Respected President Joseph Aoun, of Lebanon, and Prime Minister Bibi Netanyahu, of Israel. These two Leaders have agreed that in order to achieve PEACE between their Countries, they will formally begin a 10 Day CEASEFIRE at 5 P.M. EST. On Tuesday, the two Countries met for the first time in 34 years here in Washington, D.C., with our Great Secretary of State, Marco Rubio. I have directed Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Rubio, together with the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Dan Razin' Caine, to work with Israel and Lebanon to achieve a Lasting PEACE. It has been my Honor to solve 9 Wars across the World, and this will be my 10th, so let's, GET IT DONE! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 美国总统特朗普宣布以色列与黎巴嫩之间停火10天：我刚刚与备受尊敬的黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩和以色列总理比比·内塔尼亚胡进行了极好的交谈。这两位领导人一致认为，为了实现两国之间的和平，他们将正式开始为期10天的停火，时间为美东时间下午5点。周二，两国34年来首次在这里，即华盛顿特区会面，我们伟大的国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥在场。我已指示副总统JD·万斯和国务卿鲁比奥，与参谋长联席会议主席丹·拉津·凯恩一起，与以色列和黎巴嫩合作，实现持久和平。能解决世界各地的9场战争是我的荣幸，这将是第10场，所以让我们完成它！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普 @wfwitness

text: While the bastard Aoun is on a call with Trump and with the possibility that Netanyahu Will join Israel is carrying a massive wave of bombing on many Lebanese towns, described as fire belts This is a mere hour after the Israeli terrorist army drone strikes a mother and her children in Saadeyet area. Note that a ceasefire is not an end of this war Israel is an occupying force that is demolishing towns as we speak and will continue to do so..razing towns There is a lot more to talk soon about
text_zh: 当混蛋奥恩正在与特朗普通话，且内塔尼亚胡有可能加入时，以色列正在对许多黎巴嫩城镇进行大规模轰炸，被称为火带。这仅仅是在以色列恐怖军队无人机袭击萨阿迪耶地区的一位母亲和她的孩子一小时后。请注意，停火并不意味着这场战争的结束。以色列是一个占领军，正如我们所说，它正在拆毁城镇，并将继续这样做……夷平城镇。很快会有更多关于此的消息

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区激活无人机警报警报器。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 "For more than a month, the movement of ships in this region has been practically stopped due to the unprovoked armed aggression of the USA and Israel against Iran." Russian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Maria Zakharova on the Strait of Hormuz blockade: The blockade has deprived the global market of 5% of all oil, more than 30% of liquefied natural gas, 40% of helium, around 40% of carbamide, 44% of sulfur, more than a quarter of ammonia, and a significant portion of phosphates. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 “一个多月来，由于美国和以色列对伊朗发动的无端武装侵略，该地区的船只航行实际上已经停止。” 俄罗斯外交部发言人玛丽亚·扎哈罗娃谈霍尔木兹海峡封锁：封锁使全球市场损失了所有石油的5%、超过30%的液化天然气、40%的氦气、约40%的尿素、44%的硫磺、超过四分之一的氨以及很大一部分磷酸盐。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: A new book, RFK Jr.: The Fall and Rise, claims Robert F. Kennedy Jr. once stopped on a highway to cut off a dead raccoon’s genitals to “study them later.” Source: New York Post
text_zh: 一本名为《小罗伯特·F·肯尼迪：陨落与崛起》（RFK Jr.: The Fall and Rise）的新书声称，小罗伯特·F·肯尼迪曾在一处高速公路上停车，割下了一只死浣熊的生殖器，以便“以后研究”。来源：《纽约邮报》

text: 🇷🇺 🇫🇮 🇱🇹 🇱🇻 🇪🇪 Russian Security Council Secretary Sergey Shoigu reminded Finland and the Baltic states about Russia’s right to self-defense in connection with Ukrainian drone strikes on Russia via the territory of these countries. “This can occur in two cases: either Western air defense systems are highly ineffective, as has already been seen during the developments in the Middle East, or the states in question are deliberately providing their airspace, that is, acting as direct accomplices in aggression against Russia. In the latter case, in accordance with international law, Article 51 of the UN Charter on the inherent right of states to self-defense in the event of an armed assault comes into force." 🐻 Westoid media: "another blatant attack and threats to sovereignty and freedumb of EU colonies." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇫🇮 🇱🇹 🇱🇻 🇪🇪 俄罗斯联邦安全会议秘书谢尔盖·绍伊古提醒芬兰和波罗的海国家，鉴于乌克兰通过这些国家的领土对俄罗斯发动无人机袭击，俄罗斯拥有自卫权。“这种情况可能发生在两种情况下：要么是西方防空系统效率极低，正如在中东事态发展中所看到的那样；要么是相关国家蓄意提供其领空，即充当了针对俄罗斯侵略行为的直接共犯。在后一种情况下，根据国际法，联合国宪章第51条关于国家在遭受武装攻击时固有的自卫权即告生效。” 🐻 西方媒体：“这是对欧盟殖民地主权和‘自由’的又一次公然攻击和威胁。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇵🇸 The IDF announced that the Israeli Navy’s Shayetet 13 commando unit conducted an unprecedented operation “thousands of kilometres” from Israel in an area where it has never operated before. A submarine also operated at the farthest distance in the fleet’s history, deployed across three arenas simultaneously. During the war with Iran, the Navy shot down dozens of drones in around 40 aerial threat incidents. Warships carried out 53 strikes in Lebanon and six in the Gaza Strip, while Naval Intelligence supported some 95 airstrikes in Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇵🇸 以色列国防军宣布，以色列海军第13突击队在距离以色列“数千公里”外、此前从未涉足的区域执行了一次前所未有的行动。一艘潜艇也在该舰队历史上最远的距离上执行了任务，同时部署在三个战区。在与伊朗的战争期间，海军在大约40起空中威胁事件中击落了数十架无人机。军舰在黎巴嫩进行了53次打击，在加沙地带进行了6次打击，而海军情报部门则支持了对伊朗的约95次空袭。 @wfwitness

text: 🇫🇷 ✡️ MASSIVE WIN: France's Yadan Law has been WITHDRAWN after mass opposition forced centrist Assembly members to pull the bill. The law would have criminalized criticism of Israel by integrating the IHRA definition of antisemitism into French law, prosecuting comparisons between Israeli policy and the Third Reich as hate speech and making slogans like "Free Palestine" a criminal offense as advocacy for terrorism. 150,000 signatures on an online petition. Pressure from far-left Assembly members and right-wing citizens. The government promised a watered-down version for late June, but the Assembly enters recess July 14, any delay pushes this back weeks or months. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇫🇷 ✡️ 重大胜利：在遭到大规模反对并迫使中间派议员撤回法案后，法国的《亚丹法》（Yadan Law）已被撤回。该法律原计划通过将国际大屠杀纪念联盟（IHRA）的反犹太主义定义纳入法国法律，将批评以色列的行为定为刑事犯罪，并将把以色列政策与第三帝国进行比较的行为视为仇恨言论，同时将“解放巴勒斯坦”等口号定为支持恐怖主义的刑事犯罪。在线请愿书征集了15万个签名。在极左翼议员和右翼公民的压力下，政府承诺在6月下旬推出一个弱化版本，但国民议会将于7月14日休会，任何延误都会将此事推迟数周或数月。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 ⚡️ Axios Journalists, Barak Ravid: "a ceasefire between Lebanon and Israel could happen tonight" 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Axios: An Israeli defence official believes that ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon could be announced tonight. "We are at a crossroads. Nothing is final but it could happen today.” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese presidency: Trump told President Aoun he is committed to Lebanon's request to bring about a ceasefire as soon as possible. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩总统府：特朗普告诉奥恩总统，他致力于满足黎巴嫩尽快实现停火的请求。推文

text: Open Source Intel The Israeli Navy reveals that its elite Shayetet 13 unit carried out a rare long range mission during the war, operating thousands of kilometers from Israel in territory it had never entered before. No details were provided on the timing, location, or nature of the operation. The Navy also confirms a record deployment, with a submarine operating at the furthest distance ever reached by Israel’s fleet. Submarines were active across three separate theaters at the same time, spread over vast distances. During the conflict, naval forces handled around 40 aerial threat incidents, intercepting dozens of drones. Warships carried out 53 strikes in Lebanon and 6 in Gaza, while Naval Intelligence supported planning for about 95 airstrikes inside Iran. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列海军透露，其精锐的第13突击队（Shayetet 13）在战争期间执行了一次罕见的远程任务，在距离以色列数千公里的从未进入过的领土上行动。关于行动的时间、地点或性质，未提供任何细节。海军还证实了一次创纪录的部署，一艘潜艇在以色列舰队有史以来到达的最远距离处执行任务。潜艇同时在三个独立的战区活动，分布在广阔的区域。在冲突期间，海军部队处理了约40起空中威胁事件，拦截了数十架无人机。军舰在黎巴嫩进行了53次打击，在加沙进行了6次打击，而海军情报部门支持了伊朗境内约95次空袭的规划。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @BarakRavid : President Trump spoke to Lebanese President Aoun, Lebanese official tells me tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News) 转推 @BarakRavid：黎巴嫩官员告诉我，特朗普总统与黎巴嫩总统奥恩进行了通话。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Footage showing Ukrainian strikes with FP-2 middle-range OWA-UAVs targeting Russian logistics in Russia-controlled parts of Ukraine's Donetsk Oblast. At one point, the Ukrainian UAV can be seen overflying the Donbas Arena - home stadium of Shakhtar Donetsk football club - located in the city of Donetsk. The FP-2s are employing automatic target detection. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News) 视频显示乌克兰使用FP-2中程单向攻击无人机（OWA-UAV）打击俄罗斯控制的乌克兰顿涅茨克州境内的俄罗斯后勤设施。在某一时刻，可以看到乌克兰无人机飞越顿涅茨克市的顿巴斯竞技场——顿涅茨克矿工足球俱乐部的主场。FP-2无人机采用了自动目标检测技术。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah fired five rockets at the Haifa area. Some were intercepted, others hit open areas. No injuries reported. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 真主党向海法地区发射了五枚火箭弹。部分被拦截，其余击中开阔地带。暂无人员伤亡报告。推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Pakistan says it will continue efforts to end the war and push forward negotiations. Iran says it is fully prepared for comprehensive defense. During a meeting in Tehran, Pakistan’s army chief briefed Iran’s central military commander on Islamabad’s diplomatic efforts and talks aimed at de-escalation. The Iranian commander thanked Pakistan for its supportive stance during recent conflicts, saying adversaries have misjudged Iran’s public backing and military capability. He added that Iran’s armed forces are fully ready and rely on domestically produced equipment, with strong public support. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 巴基斯坦表示将继续努力结束战争并推动谈判。伊朗表示已为全面防御做好充分准备。在德黑兰的一次会议上，巴基斯坦陆军参谋长向伊朗中央军事指挥官通报了伊斯兰堡的外交努力和旨在缓和局势的会谈。伊朗指挥官感谢巴基斯坦在近期冲突中给予的支持立场，称对手误判了伊朗的民众支持和军事能力。他补充说，伊朗武装部队已做好充分准备，依靠国产装备，并拥有强大的民众支持。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 The Office of the Lebanese President confirmed that President Aoun held a call with U.S. President Trump. Aoun said he hopes these efforts will continue in order to stop the fighting as soon as possible and advance a broader peace process. Trump reaffirmed his support for Lebanon and emphasised his commitment to meeting the Lebanese request for a ceasefire at the earliest possible time. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩总统办公室证实，奥恩总统与美国总统特朗普进行了通话。奥恩表示，他希望这些努力能够持续下去，以便尽快停止战斗并推进更广泛的和平进程。特朗普重申了他对黎巴嫩的支持，并强调他致力于满足黎巴嫩尽快实现停火的请求。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Several sonic booms were heard across multiple areas in Lebanon including the capital Beirut a few moments ago. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 片刻前，黎巴嫩多个地区（包括首都贝鲁特）听到了数次音爆。@wfwitness

text: Pakistan’s Army Chief Asim Munir met Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters Commander Major General Ali Abdollahi.
text_zh: 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔会见了伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部指挥官阿里·阿卜杜拉希少将。

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Pakistan will continue efforts to end the war and advance negotiations; Iran is ready for full-scale defense 🔹 Pakistan’s army chief, in a meeting with Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya HQ commander, outlined steps taken to end the war and his talks in Tehran, stressing continued efforts. 🔹 Major General Abdollahi, meeting Field Marshal Asim Munir, thanked Pakistan’s support and said the enemy miscalculated Iran’s people and military strength. 🔹 He added that all equipment used was domestically produced, and Iran’s armed forces are fully prepared for comprehensive defense if needed. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 巴基斯坦将继续努力结束战争并推进谈判；伊朗已为全面防御做好准备 🔹 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长在与伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚总部指挥官会面时，概述了为结束战争所采取的步骤及其在德黑兰的会谈情况，并强调将继续努力。 🔹 阿卜杜拉希少将在会见阿西姆·穆尼尔元帅时，感谢了巴基斯坦的支持，并表示敌人误判了伊朗的人民和军事实力。 🔹 他补充说，所使用的所有装备均为国产，如果需要，伊朗武装部队已为全面防御做好充分准备。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Trump spoke with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun as Israel weighs a possible ceasefire with Hezbollah. Lebanon is pushing for a deal, and Trump said he wants it finalized quickly, though Israel has not made a decision yet. Source: Axios
text_zh: 在以色列权衡与真主党可能停火之际，特朗普与黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩进行了交谈。黎巴嫩正在推动达成协议，特朗普表示希望尽快敲定，尽管以色列尚未做出决定。来源：Axios

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇸🇾 The Syrian Foreign Ministry announced that the handover over of U.S. military sites in Syria to the Syrian military is complete. They attributed the extension of control over areas previously not controlled by the Syrian state, such as northeastern Syria, to the government’s sustained efforts to unify the country. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇸🇾 叙利亚外交部宣布，美国在叙利亚的军事基地已移交给叙利亚军队。他们将叙利亚政府对叙利亚东北部等此前未受控地区控制权的扩大，归功于政府为统一国家所做的持续努力。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Commander-in-Chief of the Iranian Army Hatami rejected U.S. claims that the Iranian Air Force is destroyed, reporting that Iranian fighter jets escorted the Pakistani delegation arriving in Tehran yesterday through Iranian airspace. “They say, we took away your air force. Yesterday, we had a guest. He was entering the country’s airspace. They said, we want our aircraft to come and escort. We said, no need. With two times the number of aircraft they wanted to escort, we escorted. We brought our guest and carried out the mission.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 伊朗军队总司令哈塔米驳斥了美国关于伊朗空军已被摧毁的说法，并报告称，伊朗战斗机昨日为抵达德黑兰的巴基斯坦代表团护航，穿越了伊朗领空。“他们说，我们摧毁了你们的空军。昨天，我们有一位客人。他进入了该国领空。他们说，我们希望我们的飞机来护航。我们说，不需要。我们派出的护航飞机数量是他们要求的两倍。我们接到了我们的客人并完成了任务。” @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated The Tuapse oil refinery in Russia continues to burn, with a column of smoke captured by surveillance cameras as far as 78 km away - from the "Zhemchuzhina" hotel in Sochi. Recent satellite imagery shows a massive blaze on the plant's grounds. In addition to the refinery itself, one of the fires was recorded right in the sea near the coast. This facility is a strategic hub for Rosneft, operating as a unified complex with the maritime terminal. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯图阿普谢炼油厂持续燃烧，远在78公里外的索契“珍珠”酒店的监控摄像头拍到了烟柱。最新的卫星图像显示工厂区域内火势巨大。除了炼油厂本身，海岸附近的海面上也记录到了火情。该设施是俄罗斯石油公司的战略枢纽，与海上码头作为一个统一的综合体运营。推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM: U.S. forces are focused, vigilant, and highly motivated as they execute a blockade on vessels attempting to enter or exit Iranian ports. After 72 hours of enforcement, 14 vessels have turned around to comply with the blockade at the direction of American forces. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044786379721175542/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 中央司令部：美军在执行对试图进出伊朗港口的船只的封锁任务时，保持专注、警惕且士气高昂。在执行封锁72小时后，已有14艘船只在美军的指示下掉头以遵守封锁规定。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044786379721175542/video/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Ukrainian soldier with a dog pulled from the rubble of a Russian air strike on the eastern Ukrainian city of Sviatohirsk yesterday. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044785711723798754/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 昨天，一名乌克兰士兵抱着一只从俄罗斯对乌克兰东部城市斯维亚托希尔斯克空袭后的废墟中救出的狗。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044785711723798754/photo/1 推文
